changeSet.author: admin
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO country (code, iso2, active) VALUES ('switzerland', 'CH', true), ('south-korea', 'KR', true), ('japan', 'JP', true), ('germany', 'DE', true), ('france', 'FR', true), ('italy', 'IT', true), ('united-states', 'US', true), ('china', 'CN', true), ('hong-kong', 'HK', true), ('austria', 'AT', true), ('united-kingdom', 'GB', true), ('sweden', 'SE', true) ON CONFLICT (iso2) DO UPDATE SET code = EXCLUDED.code, active = EXCLUDED.active;

changeSet.author: admin
